Van Buren County, MI | Data cut-off May 22, 2026 | Report May 27, 2026

Murch Solar Project Control Dashboard

102 MWp utility-scale PV project with turnkey EPC scope, GameChange single-axis trackers, 31,352 piles, 2,486 tracker rows, and 171,470 modules.

View progress Schedule status
Overall Status Critical MC milestone cannot be held without revised plan.
Piles Installed 8,885 / 31,352 28.3% complete project-wide.
Panels Delivered 130,163 / 171,470 75.9% delivered; install blocked by purlins.
Peak Manpower 310 Week of Jul 20 resource peak.

Schedule read

Critical path pressure is no longer only piling.

JB Solar non-mobilization creates a pile-rate gap, while the GameChange purlin redesign directly blocks module installation until July 22. Electrical BOS award and SCADA lead time are the next constraints to close.
